title: FITOUT Fashion App
description: A social fashion app featuring a digital closet, real-time synchronization, and interactive 2D layered try-on capabilities built with Firebase and SwiftUI.

title: Ocean Conservation Tech
description: 1st Place Global Challenge winner. Engineered a CAD-simulated recycling machine designed to convert discarded fishing gear into reusable materials.

title: Home-Cook Delivery App
description: Top 20 Finalist globally. Co-built an MVP mobile platform connecting home cooks with local customers using Flutter and Firebase.

title: Smart Handwashing Tub
description: Developed ML algorithms and computer vision pipelines via Arduino to track hand motion and ensure WHO-recommended hygiene protocols.

title: Quantitative Finance Model
description: Developed a high-frequency machine learning framework to accurately forecast short-term equity volatility regimes.

title: 3D Medical Visualizer
description: Built an interactive 3D prototype using Matplotlib and Open3D to render tooth displacement predictions for orthodontic treatments.

title: Campus Study Room Finder
description: Placeholder project: a small web app concept for checking real-time availability of group study rooms on campus.

title: Personal Finance Dashboard
description: Placeholder project: exploratory UI for visualizing monthly spending categories and savings goals from CSV exports.

title: Habit Tracker API
description: Placeholder project: REST-style API sketch for logging daily habits and streak counts with simple JSON persistence.

title: Recipe Ingredient Parser
description: Placeholder project: prototype script to normalize ingredient lines from unstructured recipe text into structured fields.

title: Bike Route Heatmap
description: Placeholder project: notebook experiment plotting preferred cycling routes from anonymized GPS samples.

title: Markdown Course Notes Site
description: Placeholder project: static site generator workflow for turning lecture notes in Markdown into searchable HTML pages.
